commit_message:
feat(coverage): update testbench, add more coverage feat(coverage): update testbench, add more coverage - add coverage modules from py2
- update core testbench to vutb
- increase test coverage for core
- fix Line Status Register bits
- test coverage:
```bash
make setup
make -C ../iob_uart16550_V0.1/hardware/simulation/ run SIMULATOR=verilator COV=1
```

+
     attributes_dict = {
         "name": "iob_uut",
         "generate_hw": True,

             "type": "P",

         },
         {
             "name": "DATA_W",
@@ -37,43 +47,79 @@ def setup(py_params_dict):
             },

-            "name": "wb_s",

             "signals": {
-                "type": "wb",
-                "ADDR_W": "ADDR_W",

+    #

         {

+            "descr": "uart16550 #0 CSRs interface",
             "signals": {
-                "type": "rs232",
+                "type": "iob",
+                "prefix": "uart16550_0_csrs_",

             },
         },
         {
-            "name": "interrupt_o",

+            "name": "uart0_interrupt",
+            "descr": "UART16550 #0 Interrupt signal",
             "signals": [
                 {
-                    "name": "int_o",
+                    "name": "uart16550_0_interrupt",
                     "width": "1",
-                    "descr": "UART interrupt source",
                 },
             ],

-    #

-            "name": "uart_cbus",

+                "prefix": "uart0_",

+        },
+        # UART16550 #1

+            "name": "uart1_csrs",
+            "descr": "uart16550 #1 CSRs interface",
             "signals": {
                 "type": "iob",
-                "prefix": "internal_",
-                "ADDR_W": "ADDR_W",
+                "prefix": "uart16550_1_csrs_",
+                "ADDR_W": 5,
+            },
+        },
+        {
+            "name": "uart1_interrupt",
+            "descr": "UART16550 #1 Interrupt signal",
+            "signals": [
+                {
+                    "name": "uart16550_1_interrupt",
+                    "width": "1",
+                },
+            ],
+        },
+        {

+            "descr": "uart16550 #1 RS232 interface",
+            "signals": {

     ]

             "connect": {

-                "iob_csrs_cbus_s": "uart_cbus",

+            "addr_w": 6,

+    ]
+    #
+    # Snippets
+    #
+    attributes_dict["snippets"] = [
+        {
+            "verilog_code": """
+        assign uart1_rs232_rxd = uart0_rs232_txd;
+        assign uart0_rs232_rxd = uart1_rs232_txd;
+        assign uart0_rs232_cts = 1'b1;
+        assign uart1_rs232_cts = 1'b1;
+            """,
         },
     ]

examples.commit_message:
feat(coverage): update testbench, add more coverage feat(coverage): update testbench, add more coverage - add coverage modules from py2
- update core testbench to vutb
- increase test coverage for core
- fix Line Status Register bits
- test coverage:
```bash
make setup
make -C ../iob_uart16550_V0.1/hardware/simulation/ run SIMULATOR=verilator COV=1
```
examples.patch:
@@ -2,8 +2,13 @@
 #
 # SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
 
-# SOURCES
-VTOP:=iob_uart16550_tb
+# annotations path
+CUSTOM_COVERAGE_FLAGS=cov_annotated
+CUSTOM_COVERAGE_FLAGS+=-E iob_uut.v
+CUSTOM_COVERAGE_FLAGS+=-E uart_debug_if.v
+CUSTOM_COVERAGE_FLAGS+=--waive uart16550_coverage.waiver
+CUSTOM_COVERAGE_FLAGS+=--waived-tag
+CUSTOM_COVERAGE_FLAGS+=-o uart16550_coverage.rpt
 
 #tests
 TEST_LIST+=test1
examples.before_code:
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2025 IObundle
#
# SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT

# SOURCES
VTOP:=iob_uart16550_tb

#tests
TEST_LIST+=test1
test1:
	make run SIMULATOR=$(SIMULATOR)
examples.after_code:
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2025 IObundle
#
# SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT

# annotations path
CUSTOM_COVERAGE_FLAGS=cov_annotated
CUSTOM_COVERAGE_FLAGS+=-E iob_uut.v
CUSTOM_COVERAGE_FLAGS+=-E uart_debug_if.v
CUSTOM_COVERAGE_FLAGS+=--waive uart16550_coverage.waiver
CUSTOM_COVERAGE_FLAGS+=--waived-tag
CUSTOM_COVERAGE_FLAGS+=-o uart16550_coverage.rpt

#tests
TEST_LIST+=test1
test1:
	make run SIMULATOR=$(SIMULATOR)
